# Manav Baghel

> Developer portfolio of Manav Baghel, a B.Tech Computer Science student specializing in backend software engineering with Java, Spring Boot, Python, Flask, and cloud technologies.

## About
Manav Baghel is a Backend Developer based in Punjab, India. He builds scalable REST APIs, database-backed architectures, and containerized distributed systems.

## Contact Info
- [Email](mailto:manavbaghhel@gmail.com)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/manav-2812)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/manav-baghel)

- GrabBite
- AutoGrade
